title: feat: split midijourney into free and large tiers
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Free the MIDI
gist.blurb: Midijourney is now available on the free tier! We've also added a heavy-duty 'large' variant for when you need to compose a digital symphony.
gist.summary: Split the Midijourney text model into a free base version powered by Claude Haiku and a new 'midijourney-large' variant powered by Claude Opus.
gist.impact: Everyone can now generate MIDI prompts for free, while power users retain access to a larger, more capable model for complex compositions.
gist.visual_concept: Music and MIDI generation split into two sizes. Polly the bee wearing headphones, interacting with two synthesizers or keyboards—one small and accessible, one large and complex. Musical notes floating around.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny headphones, playing a small lime green (#ecf874) MIDI keyboard synthesizer. Next to her is a larger, chunky retro synthesizer. Pixelated musical notes float in the air. Soft pastel lavender and peach gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
